name: ai1-satellite-tools
description: Manage a CRHQ satellite's resources: install/backup versioned packages (skills, recipes, agents, jobs, services) and run the satellite's Ai1 Platform Hub client (register, config, heartbeat, packages)

scripts.test: node tests/skill-recipe.test.mjs && node tests/agent.test.mjs && node tests/job.test.mjs && node tests/runner.test.mjs && node tests/service.test.mjs && node tests/filter.test.mjs && node tests/options.test.mjs && node tests/install-log.test.mjs && node tests/backup.test.mjs && node tests/remote.test.mjs

comment: No runtime dependencies — yaml is vendored at scripts/lib/vendor/yaml.mjs so the skill installs without npm install. To regenerate that bundle, install yaml as a devDependency and run the esbuild command in its header.
